content:
About me 👷‍♂️  Civil Engineer having interests in Structural Engineering, Structural Analysis and Design, Programming and Computer-Aided Design.
 Education  Diploma in Civil Engineering, University of Patras  Languages  English Greek  Contact me 📧 Want to get in touch? Feel free to send me an email and I will get back to you as soon as possible.
alex@alexkanavos.com
